steps.assistant_text: Vec3-by-3x3-matrix rotate (column-major, stride 0x10). 16-diff near-miss was the FP-reduction final-add operand-order cap PLUS its load-schedule cascade. Cracked by stacking two commutative-spelling levers: (1) write outer add product-first `M[8]*v.z + (...)` so the running-sum lands as add.s fs (target order); (2) write the inner pair v.y-term-first `M[4]*v.y + M[0]*v.x` so IDO's RTL eval emits the M[0]*v.x product/load first, matching the target load schedule. 16->8 (outer swap)->0 (inner swap).
